title: Quietforge Portfolio Rebuild — Master Todo

Tak to ma być/Inbox Killer — Copy & Wireframe (Filar 2).md

build_gate: npm run build && npm run typecheck

tasks.title: Pre-flight audit — read current codebase + strategy docs
tasks.description: Read all existing components, layout, pages, and all 7 Filar 2 strategy documents to understand current state.
dod: All 7 source docs read and understood
Existing component inventory complete
Current brand references (FlexGrafik) identified for replacement

tasks.title: Brand migration — layout.tsx metadata & globals.css
tasks.description: Update root layout metadata, title template, OG, Twitter, JSON-LD schema from FlexGrafik → Quietforge. Verify accent colours in globals.css fit Quietforge identity.
dod: Title template shows '... | Quietforge'
OG image URL points to /og/home.png
JSON-LD WebSite name is Quietforge
Twitter card brand is Quietforge
All CSS vars unchanged unless identity requires accent shift
`npm run build` passes
`npm run typecheck` passes

tasks.title: Create shared Header component
tasks.description: Sticky header with: [BRAND] logo, Solutions▾ dropdown (4 modules + Managed Automation), How It Works, Results, Pricing, About, Blog links. Persistent 'Book Automation Map →' CTA button (contrast variant). Mobile hamburger menu. Follows Filar 2 sitemap §1 menu structure.
dod: Sticky on scroll
Desktop: full horizontal menu with Solutions dropdown
Mobile: hamburger with full overlay/accordion menu
'Book Automation Map →' CTA visible on all breakpoints
Dropdown has 5 items (Inbox Killer, Web Upgrade, Sales Funnel, Lead Magnet, Managed Automation)
All links use Next.js `Link` component
Uses CSS vars from globals.css — no hardcoded colors
`prefers-reduced-motion` respected
Build passes

tasks.title: Create shared Footer component
tasks.description: Mini-sitemap (4 columns: brand, solutions, company, get started), repeated CTA Discovery, contact email, one-way Pillar 3 bridge link. Matches Filar 2 sitemap footer spec.
dod: 4-column layout on desktop, stacked on mobile
Column 1: [BRAND] + tagline from source doc
Column 2: Solutions list (5 items, all linked)
Column 3: Company links (How It Works, Results, Pricing, About, Blog)
Column 4: 'Book your Automation Map →' CTA + email + optional Telegram
Bottom line: 'Building something bigger? →' links to Pillar 3 (one-way, external)
Copyright with current year + Quietforge
Build passes

tasks.title: Extend existing UI primitives
tasks.description: Extend Button.tsx (withArrow prop, size='xl'), Card.tsx (hover, interactive variants). Keep existing Section.tsx and Badge.tsx unchanged.
dod: Button supports `withArrow` prop → adds arrow icon after children
Button supports `size='xl'` (px-10 py-5 text-lg)
Card supports `hover` variant (border highlight on hover)
Card supports `interactive` variant (cursor-pointer + hover lift)
Backward compatible — existing usages not broken
Build passes

tasks.title: Create new UI primitives
tasks.description: Eyebrow.tsx (section label), IconTile.tsx (icon+text tile), ProcessStep.tsx (numbered step), PricingCard.tsx (tiered pricing), FaqItem.tsx (collapsible FAQ). All dark-theme, CSS-var-based, mobile-first.
dod: Each component accepts `className` prop for extending
Each component uses CSS vars — no hardcoded colors
Eyebrow: renders accent-colored label above section headings
IconTile: props for icon, title, description, optional href
ProcessStep: props for number, title, description, icon, isActive
PricingCard: props for tier name, price, currency, period, features[], ctaLabel, ctaHref, highlighted boolean
FaqItem: collapsible with smooth open/close animation, respects reduced-motion
Build passes

tasks.title: Create lib utilities (motion.ts, constants.ts)
tasks.description: Extract shared Framer Motion variants into lib/motion.ts. Create lib/constants.ts with site config, routes map, nav items, social links, pricing constants.
dod: motion.ts exports: fadeIn, slideUp, staggerContainer, scaleIn variants
Constants exported for all 12+ routes as single source of truth
Pricing constants match Pricing doc € values exactly
Navigation items match sitemap structure exactly
Build passes

tasks.title: Create error/loading/not-found boundaries
tasks.description: Root error.tsx (UI error boundary with retry), not-found.tsx (404 with CTA back to home), loading.tsx (skeleton). All consistent with Quietforge dark-theme design.
dod: error.tsx catches rendering errors, shows friendly message + retry button
not-found.tsx shows 404 graphic + 'Back to home' link + Discovery CTA
loading.tsx shows minimal skeleton matching page structure
All dark-theme consistent with globals.css
Build passes

tasks.title: Delete superseded old components
tasks.description: Remove components that won't be used in new architecture: TrustBar.tsx, Solution.tsx, ProjectShowcase.tsx, RiskReversal.tsx, CTASection.tsx, Products.tsx, Trust.tsx.
dod: 7 files deleted from filesystem
No remaining imports reference these files
Build passes

tasks.title: Phase 0 build gate + handoff
tasks.description: Final build + typecheck + write session handoff.
dod: `npm run build` passes with zero errors
`npm run typecheck` passes with zero errors
Handoff doc written to docs/handoffs/YYYY-MM-DD-phase-0-foundation.md
brand (Quietforge) visible in layout.tsx metadata

Mobile-first responsive

tasks.title: Final build gate + handoff
tasks.description: Final build, typecheck, and write comprehensive handoff documenting architecture, new routes, Mollie integration notes, decisions made.
dod: `npm run build` passes with zero errors and zero warnings
`npm run typecheck` passes with zero errors
Handoff doc written to docs/handoffs/YYYY-MM-DD-quietforge-rebuild.md
Handoff includes: route map, component architecture, payment integration notes, env vars required, pending decisions

meta_notes.static_export_impact: This project uses output:'export'. This blocks API routes. Mollie payment must use client-side Payment Links or separate Vercel Functions, NOT /api/mollie/route.ts as originally planned.
meta_notes.zzpackage_mollie_finding: zzpackage uses WooCommerce PHP Mollie plugin — NO reusable Node.js patterns. Must build fresh Mollie integration from Node SDK.
meta_notes.content_ready: All page copy is already written in 'Tak to ma być/' directory. DO NOT rewrite — use verbatim.
meta_notes.price_ssot: Final prices in Pricing doc §0. Use across ALL pages: Discovery €290, Inbox Killer from €1,200, etc.
meta_notes.old_urls: Must redirect /inbox-killer and /digital-modernization to new paths to preserve SEO.
meta_notes.honest_metrics: Results page must use [X] placeholders — do NOT fabricate numbers per Strategy §9 discipline.
meta_notes.one_way_pillar3: Bridge to Pillar 3 must be one-way only (About page + Footer). Never in primary CTA flow.
